warn.no_summary:
Every turn requires a summary: tool. Example:
<todo>
- [ ] summary: Investigated the auth module structure
</todo>
warn.unknown_with_summary: Summary provided but <unknown> is not empty. Either resolve unknowns with tools or clear <unknown></unknown> before summarizing.
warn.unknown_no_tools:
<unknown> has content but no tools were listed. Example:
<todo>
- [ ] read: path/to/file # investigate the unknown
</todo>
warn.stray_output: Output detected outside structured tags. ALL output must be inside <todo>, <known>, <unknown>, or <edit> tags. Plain text between tags is discarded.
warn.todo_edit_no_tag: Todo lists edit: or create: but no <edit> tag was provided. Include an <edit file="path"> block after the core tags.
warn.parse_edit_markers: Could not parse SEARCH/REPLACE markers from an edit block.
error.assistant_node_missing: Critical Error: assistant node not found in database for turn {turnId}
error.read_file_diff: Could not read file for diff resolution: {message}
